scripts.build: npm run build -w @notion-framer/shared && npm run build -w @notion-framer/web && npm run build -w @notion-framer/worker && npm run build -w @notion-framer/plugin
scripts.test: npm run test -w @notion-framer/shared && npm run test -w @notion-framer/worker
scripts.ci: npm run build -w @notion-framer/shared && npm run check -w @notion-framer/shared && npm run build -w @notion-framer/web && npm run typecheck -w @notion-framer/web && npm run typecheck -w @notion-framer/worker && npm run test
scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,worker,plugin -c cyan,blue,green npm:dev:web npm:dev:worker npm:dev:plugin
